title: zehneria angolensis
intro: Zehneria angolensis, also known as Wild Bergamot or African Bergamot, is a species of flowering plant in the family Cucurbitaceae. It has been traditionally used in folk medicine due to its medicinal properties, including antimicrobial, anti-inflammatory, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Zehneria angolensis include the treatment of fever, cough, and respiratory infections, as well as its use as an antiseptic to promote wound healing. Herbal preparations of Zehneria angolensis include infusions, decoctions, and ointments, which can be used to treat various health conditions.
